title: phanera siamensis
intro: Phanera siamensis, a species of climbing plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae, is commonly known as the Thai ironwood or Thai iron tree. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phanera siamensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceutical applications.
